chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 115 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution for non-compliance of office objection since 26.06.2021. ----------- 04.02.2025. Mr. Fawad holding brief for Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, Advocate for Applicant. ************ Matter is pending for non-prosecution since 2021 as no compliance has been made; therefore, this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
